From the counter

Small-batch beans, made to order.

Roasted in-house every Monday. Filter below to jump straight to what you're after.

A note on the menu

Everything's made to order.

Slow bar drinks (pour-over, cold steeps) take longer on purpose — if you're short on time before a session starts, the espresso-based drinks are quickest. Ask the counter if you're not sure what to get; we'd rather talk you into the right cup than sell you the wrong one.

Hungry, thirsty, or both?

Walk in any time we're open — no reservation needed for the counter.

Visit Us See Listening Sessions
Static & Stems

A small vinyl listening bar and coffee roastery. One record at a time, played all the way through.
